# Deposition Environment

**Summary**: The study of the conditions under which sediments were deposited.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] reconstructed the depositional environments for the Thamama Group.

## Scientific Context

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] Used to interpret the carbonate cycles and sea level changes.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] Analysis of lithology and facies.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Shu'taiba Formation marks a sea level rise and the return of shallow marine condition all over the Rub' Al Khali basin. ([[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992, p. 117]])
